templates.text: The dungeon remembers your hesitation. It will ask again.
A wrong turn. The corridor darkens. Knowledge resists those who guess.
The echo distorts. The dungeon corrects you with silence.
The walls noted that. They note everything — the correct answers brightest, the wrong ones in a different ink. You have fed the second archive.
The dungeon adjusts its assessment. Not harshly — it expected this. The calibration continues.
A gap in the knowledge. The dungeon places a marker there — not punitive, just precise. The gap will be filled or it will not. It watches to see which.
The stone cools fractionally. Wrong answers have a temperature. The dungeon has been tracking yours.
That answer has been wrong before. Someone else gave it — same confidence, same corridor. The dungeon keeps the record. It does not share it.
